nodes.desc: Compile a context/ research record into an ARA (Agent-Native Research Artifact) and run a Level-2 epistemic review — no LaTeX, no narrative paper
Review a context/ directory — sort material into ARA types, locate and align the north-star, and produce a feeding plan for the compiler
Compile the feeding plan into an ARA via the external compiler, then run Level-2 rigor review over it
Read context/INDEX.md and sort the whole directory into three ARA material types (report line, process line, images), locate the north-star file, and draft a feeding plan for the ARA compiler
Deep-read the original north-star context, distill this ARA's overall direction, and align it with the user via the reused present-and-ask / present-candidates dialogue SOPs
Turn the feeding plan into the compiler's $ARGUMENTS and run the external ARA compiler once inline to produce ../ara/
Run the external ARA rigor-reviewer (Seal Level 2, six-dimension semantic review) over ../ara/ and pass its level2_report.json to the user
